rulings.Case Title: BIANA CHERNOGUZ ET AL VS. LEANA PEREZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Judgment Of Costs; Points And Authorities In Support
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 4, 2023 line 1. DEFENDANT LEANA PEREZ'S NOTICE OF MOTION FOR COSTS is GRANTED. No opposition filed. The Court notes that the motion is not necessary as the dismissal is in file and the matured memorandum of costs is enforceable as a judgement. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: LAFA PARTNERS, LL, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY VS. ALEXANDER KUNDEL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Redeeming Admissions And For Sanctions; Memorandum In Support Thereof; Declaration Of Suzan Karayel
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 4, 2023 line 4. PLAINTIFF'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ORDER REDEEMING ADMISSIONS AND FOR SANCTIONS is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Admissions are deemed admitted. rulings.Case Title: LAFA PARTNERS, LL, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY VS. ALEXANDER KUNDEL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And For Sanctions; Memorandum In Support Thereof; Declaration Of Suzan Karayel
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 4, 2023 line 4. PLAINTIFF'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES AND FOR SANCTIONS is GRANTED, subject to opposition.
